text:
Q2. How
has mathematics helped
propel humanity
forward?
(You might
think of
examples
involving:
carrying
out
scientific
experiments;
running
our
and
democracy;
building
economy
bridges,
houses
or
other
complex
structures;
making
TVs,
mobile
phones,
computers,
bicycles, t
trains,
cars,
planes,
calendars, c
clocks, etc.)
